37.reason: [Variable declaration inside switch-case without proper scoping (C89 incompatibility); some compilers may reject this]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Variable declaration inside switch-case without proper scoping (C89 incompatibility); some compilers may reject this]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Variable declaration inside switch-case without proper scoping in older C standards (e.g., C89). This causes a compilation error because declarations must precede statements in a block.]
